failure.message: f4-desk-free-flows.spec.js:122:3 Customer -> Offer quick create flow

testcase.failure:

Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 10000ms - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: /Yeni Teklif|New Offer/i })
124 | 125 | const newOfferBtn = page.getByRole("button", { name: /Yeni Teklif|New Offer/i }); > 126 | await expect(newOfferBtn).toBeVisible(); | ^ 127 | await newOfferBtn.click(); 128 | 129 | await expect(page).toHaveURL(/\/at\/offers/); at C:\Users\Aykut\Documents\GitHub\acentem_takipte\frontend\tests\e2e\f4-desk-free-flows.spec.js:126:31
